title: First Commodore PET sold, June 5, 1977
content:
On June 5, 1977, at the summer Consumer Electronics Show, Commodore had its PET 2001 personal computer on display after showing a prototype at the January 1977 show. Chuck Peddle said Commodore took its first distributor order on that day,

The post First Commodore PET sold, June 5, 1977 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
